task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating successful authentication.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the chart for patient Conchita Hernandes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart for 'Conchita Hernandes' is open, with her name and DOB (December 4, 2006) visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Social History section of the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Social History' tab, menu item, or section is selected, expanded, or actively displayed in the patient's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Lifestyle subsection within Social History.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lifestyle' subsection or input area is visible and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the required lifestyle text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Non-smoker, no alcohol use. Lives with family.' is typed into the Lifestyle text field or input area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved or documented the social history entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Update' button is clicked, a confirmation/success message is displayed, or the entered text is visible in the saved summary view of the patient's Social History.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser displaying the NOSH ChartingSystem UI is visible. The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text input occurs within the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface, not in a generic text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: Verify the social history is being added to the correct patient's record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Conchita Hernandes' is clearly visible on the same screen and within the same application window where the lifestyle text is being entered and saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Conchita Hernandes. DOB: December 4, 2006. Practice: Hillside Family Medicine. Required text to be entered in the Lifestyle subsection of Social History: 'Non-smoker, no alcohol use. Lives with family.'
